programme.title: Sled Dogs: Feature Documentary
programme.desc: Exposes the hidden cruelty behind the sled dog racing industry and its brutal consequences.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep101: V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports including Jet Sprinting, Aquabike Racing and F1 H2O Powerboats. This episode features Round 1 of the Australian V8 Jet Sprinting Superboat Championships from New South Wales, Australia.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep510 Juneau, Alaska
programme.desc: Facing Waves host Ken Whiting travels to Juneau, Alaska, to paddle with whales, bears, glaciers and icebergs on a multi-day sea kayaking adventure.

programme.title: Xplash Ep102
programme.desc: Xplash brings you the coolest action in, on, and near water. Today you’ll meet World Champions and kayaking royalty…the Jackson family, visit China for a slippery run over an ice city, and our first stop is to the Oregon Coast for the biggest waves you've never heard of.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Bahamian Bill and Bulls
programme.desc: Captain Ridge Murphy takes the helm of the Starbrite Viking to fish for mahi and marlin with Greg and Peter Dornau in the Bahamas.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep111: Tahiti
programme.desc: This Next Stop episode explores the three Tahitian Islands of Moorea, Huahine and Bora Bora via Quad rides, cultural hikes, jet skiing, exploring a Pearl Farm, shark stingray feeding, and by checking out some of the best resorts as well as the local music scene.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Bears, Bows, The Colombos
programme.desc: Curtis and childhood friend Dino and his son, Nathan Colombo, take a fly-out adventure of a lifetime to the backcountry of Alaska chasing monster rainbows on the fly while avoiding a big bear.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Golden Shivers
programme.desc: Atoms and Void is formed in the songwriting partnership of Arlie Carstens and Eric Fisher. “Golden Shivers” is a beautiful piece of ambient electronic music akin to the works of minimalist composers Steve Reich and Meredith Monk. Good for running, dancing, driving, and doing the dishes. Play loud.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Futureproof
programme.desc: In shred world, Absinthe Films’ "Futureproof" is widely regarded as a stone cold classic. This movie showcases iconic performances from many of the best riders to ever do it, including Romain De Marchi, JP Solberg, Trevor Andrew Wolfgang Nyvelt and Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Horses Heritage
programme.desc: This week Ride travels back in time on the UK’s waterways aboard one of the last remaining horse drawn Barges. We fly high in California with Karrie Rufer, star of the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup North American League, step out with the sure-footed shires as they “Relay” acrross rural England, and witness the spectacle that is the dancing Spanish stallions at the Royal Andalusian School in Jerez.

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - GP La Baule
programme.desc: The competition that closes the madness that has happened at the Longines Jumping International in La Baule is definitely the Grand Prix. For a grand total of 200,000 euros, riders face a first round and a jump-off with a height of 1.60m. There is no mistake that, at a ranking of CSIO 5*, this is one of the toughest competitions in France only possible for the top equestrian athletes.Watch the highlights for La Baule Grand Prix 2019.

programme.title: Horse Academy Pro - Chapter 1
programme.desc: We begin this chapter rating and voting the student boxes organization at the stables and learning some tips on how horses should be taken care of in the stables. We will clean our equipment properly before feeding the horses and then we will be receiving Doctor Menegon, the voice for the Italian and International horse-riding competitions and introducing our special guest Rolf-Göran Bengtsson. Tune in on the Episode 2 Chapter 1 of Horse Academy Pro, exclusively on HorseTV!

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Episode 5 - Saint Tropez
programme.desc: We move on to sunny Saint Tropez to celebrate the fifth leg of the Longines Global Champions Tour 2022. Young talent Gilles Thomas has moved his way to second place in the standings, but Pieter Devos counts with years of experience and will not give up his first position so easily. Who will win Saint Tropez's GP?

programme.title: Global Champions League - Episode 5 - Saint Tropez

programme.title: Jumping International Le Saut Hermès - Highlights Prix du 24 Faubourg
programme.desc: After the famous Le Saut Hermès, the Prix du 24 Faubourg is also a competition with a classification of CSI5* but this time with point accumulation and against the clock. With obstacles from 1.50m to 1.60m, it is a big challenge with a progressive difficulty as rider and horse advance on the course. Relive the best moments of the Prix du 24 Faubourg in its 2019 edition.

programme.title: time2rlx Flowers

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The German manufacturer Roding created a car that even outshined the Porsche GT3 with an impressive power/weight ratio. British makes like the Caterham 620 R, Lotus Elise or Radical RXC also showed what's in play in regards to lightweight sports cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its extreme power and performance the Croatian super car Rimac Concept One opened the door to an exciting new world. Also: the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG Coupe Electric Drive. And: Tesla's impressive Model S series.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce and Bentley are the ultimate upper class status symbols. Those who prefer a sportier approach can choose from a great range of brands like Bugatti, Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche and McLaren that compete for the title of best sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the Alfieri, Maserati in 2014 celebrated their anniversary with the introduction of a beautiful grand tourer. In remembrance and as part of the three-day celebration, Maserati organised a cruise from Bologna to Torino with some of their most iconic cars.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Lamborghini Huracán Spyder, the Pagani Huayra and Ferrari's 488 Spider don't just look good. Once these super sports cars unleash their power, there is no stopping them. We took a look at these contenders, their features and performance.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Mulsanne, Bentley's flagship car, provides luxury like in a first class hotel and elegance like an Armani suit. In addition: the Rolls-Royce Ghost. And: the high-tech coupe by Mercedes, the S 63 AMG with its V8 twin-turbo engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Cayman GT4 combined the best elements that Porsche could offer. In addition: the Audi R8 V10 plus, an even stronger, lighter and faster version of the original model.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Aston Martin's Vantage N430 model is a sports car that makes drivers and enthusiasts feel the heritage of British race cars. Also: a combination of elegance and power, the Bentley Continental GTC Speed with its W12 Twin Turbo engine.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Jonah Lomu changed rugby during the 1995 World Cup. Another New Zealander, Peter Snell, put his country on the map 30 years earlier. And the 2018 World Cup final gave rise to an own goal which became a masterpiece.

programme.desc: Croatia have a new look, but will rely on its old weapon, while the Blazers hope to surprise the world once again.

programme.desc: The Spaniard Mac Marquez shook MotoGP up from 2013 onwards, winning six of the seven world titles in the Premier Class category.

programme.title: Foul Play
programme.desc: Australian tennis terrors Nick Kyrios and Bernard Tomic, American superbrat John McEnroe loses his cool and Andre Agassi falls to a historic low.

programme.title: Star Block Workout
programme.desc: Travel from Paris to London, via Johannesburg, and meet "Boost". This 23-year-old former bad boy has created his own fitness training, exclusively using his body and the surrounding urban environment.

programme.title: Flashpoint

programme.title: Sports Woman
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we look at athletes who have considered setbacks as well as challenges.

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better
programme.desc: Czech freestyle motocross star Libor Podmol is proof that the wildest dreams come true. In January, 2010 he flies to the US, buys a Suzuki 250 two-stroke, becomes 6 times world champ and signs a sponsorship deal with Rockstar Energy.

programme.title: California Republic
programme.desc: No other place offers such endless freedom while fueling surfing's evolution. California's blue skies, green waters, and landscapes inspire millions worldwide and shape global culture.

programme.title: Peace and Left II
programme.desc: A Basque freesurfer documents a five-month journey through Indonesia, traveling with family, friends, and alone, capturing his surf adventure on camera.

programme.title: All Or Nothing
programme.desc: A self-supported project celebrating two-wheel sports, filmed across Europe, featuring young talents and world-class riders in MTB, trials, BMX, and motorsports.

programme.title: Because
programme.desc: A high-end freeski documentary following 22 professional athletes across record snowfall winters, facing deep powder, massive cliffs, and extreme expeditions, while sharing their ambition, discipline, and drive to reach the next level of their careers.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 2
programme.desc: In this second episode, we will visit the historic and picturesque Mandraki Harbour before exploring the natural attractions of Butterfly Valley and Seven Springs. Rhodes is often known as the paradise island for windsurfers, so we will not miss the chance to see how it feels to be on a board out on the open water. Finally, we will visit the must-see archaeological sites that aren’t to be missed before leaving the island, the town and the Acropolis of Lindos.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 3
programme.desc: Welcome back to this edition of the Atlantic Cup. It is time for the third and final leg of the competition, the inshore series. Dragon and Gryphon Solo 2 are tied for, and teams have added 4 extra crew, allowing them to push their boats around the tight courses in Naragannset Bay. Any mistake could be the difference between first and last. Who will become the winner in this edition?

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 4 - Vic Bay
programme.desc: The Vic Bay Classic takes place in the winter months so expect the biggest swells and highest quality of surfing. Let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Tom Sizemore and Eric Roberts in this tense thriller about two FBI agents who track down a missing person's case which leads them to a group of stock brokers who hunt people for sport.

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: The Minx
programme.desc: Linnea Chiang is a mild-mannered tobacconist by day and a masked master thief by night; like some modern day Robin Hood, the black vinyl-clad "Minx" robs large corporations and gives the money away to homeless people on the streets of Chicago.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E12 - Naturally Vibrant
programme.desc: South Moravia in the Czech Republic is home to a wide variety of beautiful orchids. From there we go to the Caribbean to Cuba with its unbelievably beautiful vistas contrasted with brutal cock fighting. From Cuba we travel to Fiji in the Pacific Ocean – often considered to be a true paradise on Earth.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E13 - Naturally Hewn
programme.desc: In this episode we travel from the South to the North of the Holy Land, Israel, stopping to admire the views and soak in the biblical import of the historic sites. On to the Golan Heights in the North where recent conflict is in still much in evidence and concluding our pilgrimage on the shores of Galilee.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E01 - The Golden Gauntlet
programme.desc: Kia challenges Tom to a competition, whoever finds the most gold with one tank of gas wins - winner takes all! kwadventure

programme.title: Gold Fever - S21:E02 - Omilak Silver Mine
programme.desc: Tom and Kia helicopter into the Alaska wilderness to check out an old mysterious silver mine the buzzard left them.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E26 - Prince William A Royal Portrait
programme.desc: Explore the exciting and intriguing life of the future king, Prince William, in this engaging documentary.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E04 - The Bears that Couldn't Be
programme.desc: Temperate Rain Forest. Jim and Corey search for an epic hunting spot deep in the coastal rain forest of Vancouver Island that Jim last explored 20 years ago.

programme.title: Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three successful blind artists whose visual impairment has become the starting point for their visual explorations.

programme.title: Schmitke
programme.desc: What should have been a ordinary job in the Czech Ore Mountains, becomes a mysterious expedition for the aging engineer Julius Schmitke.

programme.desc: Naima, a doctor, Amina, a graduate, and Leila, a young student, are pursuing their individual routes to an independent life when their paths cross.

programme.desc: A group of medical students undertake some silly and frightening endeavors in order to pledge a fraternity

programme.title: DOA

programme.title: Scarlet Street
programme.desc: A man in mid-life crisis befriends a young woman, though her l fiancé persuades her to con him out of the fortune they mistakenly assume he possesses

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone
programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares a simple truth that can help you endure life’s hardest trials. True security isn't the absence of trouble; it’s the presence of a Savior who promises you’ll never walk through it alone.

programme.title: Embrace Your Place
programme.desc: What if where you are right now is exactly where God wants you? He hasn’t overlooked you; He’s set you apart. Learn how to stop comparing your position to someone else’s platform and start embracing the purpose God has for your life.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 3
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: On My Way Back
programme.desc: When it feels like God’s taking you the long way, remember: He’s worthy of your wait. If you’re feeling discouraged or struggling with obedience while you wait, start by being honest with God about where you are and trusting that His timing is always working for your good.

programme.title: Begin With Amen
programme.desc: There are seasons and situations we write off — God could never use that. But Jesus already knew about it when He found you, and He’s got a plan to redeem it. You might be wondering how, because you can’t see it yet. This sermon is an invitation to believe. If you want to know what God can do through your life, follow and find out.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 4
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max seeks news about Rosa Blanco; Mother Isabel confesses to Father Tiziano that Camilla already knows her mother's name. Camila discovers Max in a kiss with Astrid. Families at war.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max proposes to Camila to be boyfriend and girlfriend, but she doesn't believe him because she saw him kissing Astrid. The fights and attacks between the families continue and Sebastián appears beaten. Camila looks for news about Rosa Blanco, she is thought to be dead.

Florencia's only wish is that Nicolás will one day be able to forgive her for hiding the truth about his father's real murderer and the reason why he lost his son. Once Felipe realizes that the situation has been controlled by Hilario and his pawns, young Osuna and Clementina give themselves to love to make up for lost time. Victoria thanks Nicolás for having taken her father to the hospital and hopes that Fernanda Alcoy will pay for her crimes. Convinced that she has fulfilled her revenge, Fernanda resigns herself to accompany the police, but not before asking to change her clothes; from inside the room a shot is heard, so Federico and Nicolas run in search of Fernanda, who lies dead on her bed.

Once at Fernanda's funeral -who preferred to commit suicide rather than go to jail- Leopoldo consoles his youngest daughter Eugenia while Antonieta takes refuge in Felipe's arms; As night falls, Adelaida receives a visit from Victoria, who has arrived in the capital to attend her mother's wedding; however, Adelaida and Hansen have decided to postpone it out of respect for Victoria's mourning; At that moment, the conversation between mother and daughter is interrupted by the visit of Florencia, who, once alone with Victoria, asks her forgiveness for all the harm she caused her; Florencia gives Victoria the rings that Nicolás would use in their marriage and that she will now be able to use when Nicolás signs the divorce. As the days go by, Nicolás and Victoria get married before an altar in the company of their relatives; there, Hilario gives his daughter the Cantarrana hacienda and all his lands as a wedding gift. Clementina agrees to marry Felipe, who is surprised when his beloved informs him that he will soon be a father. Not far from there, Florencia is reunited with Hilario Guanipa, who would like to run away with her, but Florencia asks him to accompany her always. The newlyweds ride through Cantarrana, where Victoria and Nicolás commit themselves to fight for the development of the hacienda and the growth of their family.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio talks to Alberto about the drawbacks a relationship with Lorena could bring to the family. Pedro is desperate in the face of Lorena's stubbornness and gives her a 24-hour deadline to disappear, while Guillermo stands firm in his decision to stay with Ignacio.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Upon seeing the photos related to the Corona case on a bulletin board, Lorena hesitates to trust Omar with what she knows. Pablo notifies that he will not grant the divorce. Paulina wants Gertrudis to accompany her to see the psychic who connected with Marco Aurelio, but her sister dismisses her angrily for believing in superstitions.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max busca noticias sobre Rosa Blanco; la Madre Isabel le confiesa al Padre Tiziano que ya Camila conoce el nombre de su mamá. Camila descubre a Max en un beso con Astrid. Familias en guerra.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Piensan que es Rosa Blanco quien desató la guerra entre las familias. La Madre Isabel piensa comunicar la noticia a Camila que cree que ella es su madre. Ezequiel y Fausto armados, se enfrentan.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila va a encontrarse con una de las Rosas Blanco para saber algo más sobre la niña de la foto que era ella pequeña y el destino de su madre. Está decepcionada porque la mujer no conoce nada y esto la pone triste.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila y Max visitan en la cárcel a otra Rosa Blanco. La mujer le confirma que tuvo una hija hembra y casi la convence. Max cree que miente para aprovechar la situación.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Una nerviosa reunión entre Ezequiel y la Madre Isabel intriga a Camila. Max apoya a Camila en su trabajo y le ofrece ayudar en la búsqueda de su madre.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila quiere saber qué hace la Madre Isabel en casa de Elda y le dicen que es ayudar para el orfanato. Camila y Yeli están en la vereda donde la mamá de Camila la abandonó de 5 años asustada y llorosa.

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: El Peluquero Romántico
programme.desc: La vida del barbero de barrio Víctor transcurre bastante tranquila. Mantiene una estricta rutina diaria tanto en el trabajo como en casa, donde pasa las noches junto a su madre escuchando boleros o viendo películas de la Época de Oro del Cine Mexicano en la televisión. Su rutina se ve alterada cuando su madre muere repentinamente. Su coqueteo con una joven camarera y su reencuentro con una antigua novia no pueden llenar el vacío dejado por su madre. Sin embargo, eso cambia cuando un día un hombre que dice ser su padre entra repentinamente a la tienda. El encuentro lo llevará a un viaje inesperado y que le cambiará la vida a Río de Janeiro.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar

Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
